sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5769" key="a)mfidei/kelos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιδείκελος</orth>, <sense id="n5769.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">visible from all sides,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
